content:
## MARKET OVERVIEW

**1. What is the Current Market Regime?**
NEUTRAL: Normal volatility (Vol: 28.0%) with mixed breadth (3/8 sectors positive).

**2. Which sectors are leading?**
Energy & Chemicals leading: PETKM (1W: +14.46% | 1M: +4.52%) ABOVE TREND; TUPRS (1W: +5.57% | 1M: +17.14%) ABOVE TREND. Heavy Industry showing selective strength: ASELS (1W: +2.09% | 1M: +15.09%) ABOVE TREND; TOASO (1W: +3.62% | 1M: -9.48%) RECOVERY.

**3. Which sectors are lagging?**
Banking & Finance weakest: HALKB (1W: -17.75% | 1M: -16.29%) BELOW TREND; VAKBN (1W: -8.70% | 1M: -20.07%) BELOW TREND. Retail & Food under pressure: SOKM (1W: -7.76% | 1M: -22.34%) BELOW TREND; ULKER (1W: -6.84% | 1M: -19.47%) BELOW TREND.

## STOCK PERFORMANCE

**4. Top Performing Stocks?**
PETKM (1W: +14.46% | 1M: +4.52%) ABOVE TREND; SASA (1W: +8.85% | 1M: -11.19%) RECOVERY; TUPRS (1W: +5.57% | 1M: +17.14%) ABOVE TREND; BIMAS (1W: +5.44% | 1M: -3.91%) RECOVERY; SISE (1W: +5.03% | 1M: -12.83%) RECOVERY.

**5. Worst Performing Stocks?**
HALKB (1W: -17.75% | 1M: -16.29%) BELOW TREND; VAKBN (1W: -8.70% | 1M: -20.07%) BELOW TREND; SOKM (1W: -7.76% | 1M: -22.34%) BELOW TREND; ULKER (1W: -6.84% | 1M: -19.47%) BELOW TREND; TRMET (1W: -6.74% | 1M: +3.41%) CORRECTION.

**6. Momentum Stocks?**
PETKM (1W: +14.46% | 1M: +4.52%) ABOVE TREND; SASA (1W: +8.85% | 1M: -11.19%) RECOVERY; TUPRS (1W: +5.57% | 1M: +17.14%) ABOVE TREND.

## SECTOR OUTLOOK

**7. Banking Sector Outlook?**
Banking fragile and broadly BELOW TREND: AKBNK (1W: -1.69% | 1M: -15.31%) BELOW TREND; GARAN (1W: -1.84% | 1M: -14.14%) BELOW TREND; ISCTR (1W: -2.24% | 1M: -18.85%) BELOW TREND — de-risk exposure until earnings/FX clarity.

**8. Industrial Sector Outlook?**
Mixed: ASELS (1W: +2.09% | 1M: +15.09%) ABOVE TREND and TOASO (1W: +3.62% | 1M: -9.48%) RECOVERY offer tactical longs, while EREGL (1W: -2.11% | 1M: -4.65%) BELOW TREND and FROTO (1W: -0.44% | 1M: -16.90%) BELOW TREND remain vulnerable.

**9. Energy & Chemicals Outlook?**
Energy leading on commodity/margin moves: TUPRS (1W: +5.57% | 1M: +17.14%) ABOVE TREND and PETKM (1W: +14.46% | 1M: +4.52%) ABOVE TREND are preferred; SASA (1W: +8.85% | 1M: -11.19%) RECOVERY and SISE (1W: +5.03% | 1M: -12.83%) RECOVERY are short-term plays.

## PORTFOLIO STRATEGY

**10. Portfolio Recommendation?**
Neutral stance: selectively overweight Energy & Chemicals and high-ROE industrials (TUPRS, PETKM, ASELS) and underweight Banking and Retail (HALKB, VAKBN, SOKM); keep position sizes tight and use stops given mixed breadth and normal vol.

## NEXT WEEK OUTLOOK

**11. Stocks to Watch Next Week?**
PETKM (1W: +14.46% | 1M: +4.52%) ABOVE TREND; TUPRS (1W: +5.57% | 1M: +17.14%) ABOVE TREND; HALKB (1W: -17.75% | 1M: -16.29%) BELOW TREND; SASA (1W: +8.85% | 1M: -11.19%) RECOVERY; ASELS (1W: +2.09% | 1M: +15.09%) ABOVE TREND.

**12. Sectors to Watch Next Week?**
Energy & Chemicals for margin-driven rallies; Banking & Finance for risk blow-ups and sentiment; Heavy Industry for selective rebounds (autos, defense).

**13. Key Levels & Triggers?**
Monitor USD/TRY moves and CBRT signaling, global oil prices and refining margins (TUPRS catalyst), upcoming corporate earnings and bank asset-quality headlines; risk-off should widen discounts across banks and retail.

## EXECUTIVE SUMMARY

NEUTRAL regime—normal volatility (28.0%) and mixed breadth (3/8) — favors selective, not broad, risk-taking. Primary opportunities in Energy & Chemicals (PETKM, TUPRS) and select heavy industrials (ASELS); main risks remain concentrated in Banking and Retail where multiple names trade BELOW TREND.
